title: cassipourea flanaganii
intro: Cassipourea flanaganii, also known as Flanagan's Cassipourea, is a plant species within the Rhizophoraceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with traditional use in treating various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, pain relief, and fever reduction. In traditional herbal medicine, Cassipourea flanaganii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in the form of a paste or ointment.
